auth.label: API Token
auth.description: Mailtrap API token used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create or manage tokens in Mailtrap Settings > API Tokens: https://docs.mailtrap.io/email-api-smtp/setup/api-tokens/.

extraFields.label: Account ID
extraFields.description: Optional default Mailtrap account ID for account-scoped actions. You can find it in Account Settings or through the Accounts API.
